ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-29-2008 Off Calendar

Petition To Discharge Executrix Anne Marie Schnell Without Further Administration
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Discharge Executrix Anne Marie Schnell Without Further Administration
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Continued To Aug-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

For Order That Assets Constitute A Trust Asset
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Levon Sagatelyan for Anne Schnell (Petitioner).

Mr. Sagatelyan reported that the purpose of opening probate was to substitute the petitioner in as a party in interest in the Peter Schnell v Eugene Schnell matter. In addition, he stated that they were close to reaching a settlement. This trust petition was filed under the probate case number in error. The Court directed Mr. Sagatelyan to file a petition under a new case number as a trust. This matter was taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiffs: R. Guitron and R. Leong.
